## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Related Issue

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/build change

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt` applied
- [ ] `cargo clippy` has no warnings
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new functionality
- [ ] Test fixtures added to `testdata/` if needed

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes (e.g. specific commands run, test cases added).

## Additional Notes

Any context, trade-offs, or things reviewers should pay attention to.
